name: Catch of the Day
description: This model gains the following trigger on all actions printed on its stat card:

granted_triggers.name: Hook, Line, and Sinker
granted_triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails. Friendly models within (r)2" of this model gain an enemy Staggered token. This model may discard a card to discard this upgrade.
granted_triggers.applies_to: all actions printed on its stat card

extraction_notes: Trigger is mandatory (indicated by 'This trigger must be declared, if able')
Timing is 'when_declaring' based on 'This trigger must be declared' language and the effect causing the action to fail immediately
